name: score_interview
description: Call this function immediately after the candidate has answered all 4 mock interview questions. Use this to score their overall interview performance based on the conversation so far. This function evaluates their answers and returns a score, grade, and coaching tips. Always call this before giving the candidate their feedback summary.
pre_call_message: Acha, ek second ruko — main aapke jawab note kar rahi hoon. Please hold.

candidate_name.description: Full name of the candidate being interviewed

job_role.description: The job role the candidate is being interviewed for, e.g., Electrician, HVAC Technician, Delivery Driver

q1_answer_quality.description: Assess the quality of the candidate's answer to question 1 (experience). Values: excellent, good, average, poor

q2_answer_quality.description: Assess the quality of the candidate's answer to question 2 (safety/compliance). Values: excellent, good, average, poor

q3_answer_quality.description: Assess the quality of the candidate's answer to question 3 (problem-solving). Values: excellent, good, average, poor

q4_answer_quality.description: Assess the quality of the candidate's answer to question 4 (professional conduct). Values: excellent, good, average, poor

candidate_confidence.description: Overall confidence level shown by the candidate during the call. Values: high, medium, low

language_used.description: Primary language used by the candidate. Values: hindi, english, hinglish

call_sid.description: The unique call ID for this session
